subcodes.first_line: O ye birds that soar in the atmosphere of the All-Merciful! Be not veiled by the words inscribed from the Beauty of Divine Unity, inasmuch as that which [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای طایران هوای رحمن بکلمات مسطوره از جمال احدیه محجوب ممانید چه که آنچه از
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @call to action, @outward and inward meanings
